title: Is support of katocontainer runtime expected?
body:
/kind feature

**Description**
Starting from Windows build 20190 the Intel's Nested virtualization is supported by WSL, FUSE is supported by WSL Kernel starting from 5.10, and RedHat virtio comes with Fedoraremixforwsl distro i.e. at glance, all Kato hardware and software requirements are fulfilled. 
Is Katocontainers runtime based on Intel virtualization technology and better suitable for lightweight VM's like WSL is expected?

comments.body:
I already have kata-runtime on the board of my Fedora34 WSL VM:
kata-runtime --version
kata-runtime  : 1.12.1
   commit   : <<unknown>>
   OCI specs: 1.0.1-dev
We expect KATA to work, whether it works on WSL, I have no idea.
